message:
fix(ui): prevent panic and timeout in BackgroundWorker lifecycle

Three robustness fixes for BackgroundWorker:

1. Make Start() idempotent with started flag - prevents panic from
   closing already-closed done channel on multiple Start() calls

2. Close done channel when watcher is nil in Start() - prevents Stop()
   from timing out when no watcher is configured

3. Skip done wait in Stop() if Start() was never called - prevents
   unnecessary 2-second timeout on early cleanup

4. Add WorkerStopped check in TriggerRefresh() - avoids spawning
   goroutine to process when worker is already stopped

All tests pass with race detector.
